items.label: Apollon — Record of Processing Activities (Art. 30 GDPR)

dsms/dpia-prescreen.title: Apollon — DPIA Pre-Screen (Art. 35 GDPR)
dsms/dpia-prescreen.description: Documents whether a full Data Protection Impact Assessment (Datenschutz-Folgenabschätzung) is required. The pre-screen uses the BayLfD "Muss-/Soll-Liste" for Bavarian public bodies and the DSK lists.

dsms/overview.title: DSMS Overview
dsms/overview.description: Data-protection management records for the standalone Apollon deployment.

dsms/processor-checklist.title: Apollon — Art. 28 Processor Checklist
dsms/processor-checklist.description: Documents whether any external recipient is a processor under Art. 28 GDPR and the status of the required contract (Auftragsverarbeitungsvertrag, AVV).

dsms/record-of-processing.title: Apollon — Record of Processing Activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
dsms/record-of-processing.description: The Art. 30 GDPR record of processing for the TUM-AET-operated Apollon deployment at . Each section corresponds to an Art. 30 element. Operators filing this record in TUM DSMS will find the same content under the portal's own field prompts.

legal-pages.title: Legal pages (Imprint & Privacy)
legal-pages.description: Apollon ships routes at /imprint and /privacy. Their content comes from Markdown files resolved at runtime through a three-layer cascade — the operator chooses which layer wins.

runbook.title: Apollon Standalone runbook
runbook.description: On-call reference for the most likely production issues. Pair with
